query:
SELECT id, externalId, serviceType, provider, planName, avcId, locId, locationAddress, customerExternalId, customerName, monthlyCost, status, serviceId, connectionId, supplierAccount
FROM services 
WHERE serviceId LIKE '%13207099%' 
   OR serviceId LIKE '%13300275%'
   OR externalId LIKE '%13207099%'
   OR externalId LIKE '%13300275%'
   OR locId LIKE '%LOC000058707%'
   OR avcId LIKE '%AVC400045874%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Keperra%'
   OR locationAddress LIKE '%Avington%'
   OR (locationAddress LIKE '%North Lakes%' AND serviceType LIKE '%NBN%')
LIMIT 15;
